events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess trench protection missing protective system. Scenario: 6-foot-deep trench, vertical walls, no trench box/shoring/sloping, spoil within one foot of edge, no ladder visible. Hazards: cave-in, struck-by spoil, fall into trench, egress failure. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk critical (cave-in can be fatal). Work_stage in-progress. component_conditions non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 30? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. findings list. actions immediate: stop work, evacuate trench, install protective system (sloping/benching/shoring/trench box), remove spoil at least 2 feet from edge (OSHA 1926.651(j)(2) requires keep back at least 2 ft from edge), provide ladder within 25 ft lateral travel (OSHA 1926.651(c)(2)). references OSHA 1926 Subpart P, 1926.651(c)(2), 1926.651(j)(2), 1926.652. Need ensure JSON valid.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":false,"risk":"critical","work_stage":"in-progress","component_conditions":["non-compliant"],"percent_complete":30,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":1.0,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Trench walls are nearly vertical with no sloping, shoring, or trench box in a 6-foot-deep excavation.","Spoil pile is within one foot of the trench edge, increasing surcharge and cave-in risk.","No means of egress (ladder) is visible in the work area.","Workers are exposed to cave-in, struck-by, and fall hazards."],"actions":["Stop work immediately and evacuate all workers from the trench.","Install a compliant protective system: sloping/benching, shoring, or trench box per OSHA 1926 Subpart P.","Move spoil pile back at least 2 feet from the trench edge.","Provide a ladder or other safe egress within 25 feet of lateral travel for workers in the trench.","Re-inspect the excavation and protective system before allowing re-entry."],"rationale":"A 6-foot-deep trench with vertical walls and no protective system is an imminent cave-in hazard. Spoil too close to the edge adds surcharge, and lack of egress violates egress requirements. Work cannot continue safely until a compliant protective system and egress are provided.","references":["OSHA 1926 Subpart P","OSHA 1926.651(c)(2)","OSHA 1926.651(j)(2)","OSHA 1926.652"]}
